title: oberonia transversiloba
intro: Oberonia transversiloba, also known as the fan orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia transversiloba include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
